scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server build && PORT=5173 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/stegofy-qr build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./frontend" --filter "./backend" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
